relationships: ber:Tom yeffeɣ-d seg umahil, atan yetteddu-d ɣer uxxam s tkeṛṛust
ber:Tom yeffeɣ-d seg umahil yernu atan yetteddu ɣer uxxam s tkeṛṛust
ber:Tameṭṭut n Tom teffeɣ seg uxxam, terra ɣer umahil
ber:Tom yeffeɣ-d seg umahil yernu atan d-yetteddu ɣer uxxam s tkeṛṛust
ber:Mi d-yeffeɣ Tom seg umahil, yedda s tazzla ɣer uxxam
ber:Tzemremt ad d-tasemt ɣer-i ɣer uxxam﹖ Maci deg yiḍ-a
ber:Tzemremt ad d-tasemt ɣer-i ɣer uxxam﹖ Maci tameddit-a
ber:Mi d-teffeɣ seg umahil, tedda s tazzla ɣer uxxam
ber:Ayweq ad iṛuḥ Tom ɣer uxxam﹖
ber:Mi d-yeffeɣ seg umahil, Tom yerra srid ɣer uxxam
ber:Tom yella yebɣa akk wid yellan din ad ddun ɣer uxxam
ber:Ttadfeɣ ɣer uxxam war ma giɣ lḥess
ber:Ayweq i yezmer ad d-yeqqel Tom ɣer uxxam﹖
ber:Ur ken-yettawi ara Tom ɣer uxxam
ber:Ɣef wacḥal ad d-taseḍ ɣer uxxam ass-a﹖
ber:Tom yeɣs ad d-yeqqel ɣer uxxam
ber:A win yufan, ad d-tased ɣer uxxam
